http.op.request.title: HTTP Request
http.op.request.description: Make a blocking HTTP request and return the full response
http.op.stream.title: HTTP Stream
http.op.stream.description: Make an HTTP request and parse streaming response (SSE/NDJSON)
http.schema.input.title: Input
http.schema.input.url.title: URL
http.schema.input.url.description: Request URL (can be relative if base_url is configured)
http.schema.input.method.title: Method
http.schema.input.method.description: HTTP method (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, etc.). Default: POST
http.schema.input.body.title: Body
http.schema.input.headers.title: Headers
http.schema.output.title: Output
http.schema.output.status.title: Status Code
http.schema.output.body.title: Body
http.schema.output.body.description: Response body (parsed as JSON if possible)
http.schema.config.title: Configuration
http.schema.config.base_url.title: Base URL
http.schema.config.base_url.description: Base URL for all requests (e.g., https://api.dify.ai/v1)
http.schema.config.auth_type.title: Auth Type
http.schema.config.auth_type.description: Authentication type: none, bearer, api_key, basic
http.schema.config.auth_token.title: Auth Token
http.schema.config.auth_token.descriptio: Authentication token/key. Prefix with 'secret:' to use secret store
http.schema.config.timeout_ms.title: Timeout (ms)
http.qa.default.title: HTTP Client
http.qa.setup.title: HTTP Client Setup
http.qa.setup.auth_type: Auth type: none, bearer, api_key, basic (default: none)
http.qa.setup.auth_token: Auth token (or 'secret:SECRET_NAME' to use secret store)
